title: Oaks UI Rework
description: ☀️ A light mode version rework of Oaks UI Rework☀️
body:
![A showcase of light mode UI elements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90f8fce7326808d1515085a558fe3e0ae5f18d98_0.webp)

**Want [Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oaks-ui-dark-rework/)?**  

# Oaks UI Reworks' Light Mode Resource Pack Java Edition
Oaks UI Rework aims to modernise the vanilla Minecraft look whilst still keeping it within ruining the vanilla feel. Inspired by Leaked Ore UI

## Supports
Java Edition 1.21x
- [Oaks Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oaks-delight)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
